languages.text: Сквозь пелену зеленого сияния, я увидел, как {name} тяжело поднимается на ноги, нечеловеческим усилием воли заставляя себя сопротивляться давлению чудовищного звука. Увы, лишь немногие нашли в себе силы последовать за {mf|ним|ней} — ужас парализовал их, лишив последних сил.

Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.
languages.original_text: Сквозь пелену зеленого сияния, я увидел, как {name} тяжело поднимается на ноги, нечеловеческим усилием воли заставляя себя сопротивляться давлению чудовищного звука. Увы, лишь немногие нашли в себе силы последовать за {mf|ним|ней} — ужас парализовал их, лишив последних сил.

traits.locale_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to get on {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.

Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.

Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.

Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.

languages.text: A través de una neblina verde, vi a {name} esforzarse por ponerse en pie, obligándose a sí mism{mf|o|a} a resistir la presión del abominable sonido con un esfuerzo de voluntad sobrehumano. Lamentablemente, solo unos pocos tuvieron fuerzas para seguirl{mf|o|a}, y el resto quedó paralizado por el terror que había mermado sus fuerzas.
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.

traits.locale_text: A través de una neblina verde, vi a {name} esforzarse por ponerse en pie, obligándose a sí mism{mf|o|a} a resistir la presión del abominable sonido con un esfuerzo de voluntad sobrehumano. Lamentablemente, solo unos pocos tuvieron fuerzas para seguirl{mf|o|a}, y el resto quedó paralizado por el terror que había mermado sus fuerzas.

languages.text: À travers une brume verte, j'ai vu {name} se relever péniblement en s'efforçant de résister à la pression de ce son ignoble par un effort de volonté surhumain. Hélas, seuls quelques-uns trouvèrent la force de {mf|le|la} suivre. Les autres restèrent paralysés par la terreur.
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.

traits.locale_text: À travers une brume verte, j'ai vu {name} se relever péniblement en s'efforçant de résister à la pression de ce son ignoble par un effort de volonté surhumain. Hélas, seuls quelques-uns trouvèrent la force de {mf|le|la} suivre. Les autres restèrent paralysés par la terreur.

languages.text: 透过幽绿的荧光迷雾，我看到{name}挣扎着站起身，以超人的意志，强行抵御那怪诞声浪的压迫。只可惜，唯有少数人能奋力追随，其余人等被恐惧抽干了最后一丝力量，瘫在原地，动弹不得。
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.

traits.locale_text: 透过幽绿的荧光迷雾，我看到{name}挣扎着站起身，以超人的意志，强行抵御那怪诞声浪的压迫。只可惜，唯有少数人能奋力追随，其余人等被恐惧抽干了最后一丝力量，瘫在原地，动弹不得。

languages.text: Durch einen leuchtenden grünen Nebel sah ich, {name}, {mf|der|die} mühsam auf die Beine kam und dem Druck des monströsen Geräusches mit übermenschlicher Willenskraft widerstand. Leider brachten nur wenige die Kraft auf, {mf|ihm|ihr} zu folgen. Die anderen waren noch von dem Schrecken gelähmt, der ihnen den letzten Rest ihrer Stärke geraubt hatte.
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.

traits.locale_text: Durch einen leuchtenden grünen Nebel sah ich, {name}, {mf|der|die} mühsam auf die Beine kam und dem Druck des monströsen Geräusches mit übermenschlicher Willenskraft widerstand. Leider brachten nur wenige die Kraft auf, {mf|ihm|ihr} zu folgen. Die anderen waren noch von dem Schrecken gelähmt, der ihnen den letzten Rest ihrer Stärke geraubt hatte.

languages.text: Parlayan yeşil bir pusun içinden {name}, insanüstü bir irade gücüyle ayağa kalkmaya ve canavarca sesin yarattığı baskıya direnmeye çalışıyordu. Ne yazık ki sadece birkaçı onu takip etme gücünü toplayabildi. Kalanlar, son güçlerini tüketen dehşet yüzünden hâlâ felç olmuş durumdaydı.
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.

traits.locale_text: Parlayan yeşil bir pusun içinden {name}, insanüstü bir irade gücüyle ayağa kalkmaya ve canavarca sesin yarattığı baskıya direnmeye çalışıyordu. Ne yazık ki sadece birkaçı onu takip etme gücünü toplayabildi. Kalanlar, son güçlerini tüketen dehşet yüzünden hâlâ felç olmuş durumdaydı.

languages.text: 緑色の光る霧の中、{name}が足に力を入れて立ち上がる姿が見えた。彼は、その巨大な音の圧力に抵抗しようと、超人的な意志の力で立ち向かっていた。しかし、彼に続く者はわずか数人。残りは恐怖に打ちのめされ、最後の力を失っていた。
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.

traits.locale_text: 緑色の光る霧の中、{name}が足に力を入れて立ち上がる姿が見えた。彼は、その巨大な音の圧力に抵抗しようと、超人的な意志の力で立ち向かっていた。しかし、彼に続く者はわずか数人。残りは恐怖に打ちのめされ、最後の力を失っていた。
